descFull: 🚀 One sentence → multi-AI-role collaboration → complete plan in minutes. Built on the agency-agents role library (216+ experts), zero-code YAML, web Studio + desktop app, 10 LLM providers (7 free). 基于 agency-agents 专家库，一句话调度多个 AI 专家自动协作，几分钟交付完整方案。
